facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. The Beauty Bar in Ông Lang sits far enough from the crowds that you actually exhale. 4.8 stars across 484 reviews. That number holds because the vibe holds. Grab a drink, watch the light change, feel your shoulders drop. Ông Lang is the quieter side of Phu Quoc, and The Beauty Bar is the reason to stay there. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Drinks arriving. Sun dropping. Nobody rushing you. The Beauty Bar in Ông Lang is exactly what the busy part of Phu Quoc is not. 4.8 stars. 484 reviews. Go see why.
